sequence.name: claim-payment-papi-send-payment-email-sequence
sequence.script:
var initPayload = JSON.parse(mc.getProperty("initialpayload")); var now = new Date(); var dateStr = now.toDateString(); var claimId = (initPayload.claims && initPayload.claims.claimId) ? initPayload.claims.claimId : ""; var policyId = (initPayload.claims && initPayload.claims.policyId) ? initPayload.claims.policyId : ""; var policyHolder = (initPayload.claims && initPayload.claims.policyHolderId) ? initPayload.claims.policyHolderId : "Customer"; var claimAmount = (initPayload.payment && initPayload.payment.claimAmount) ? initPayload.payment.claimAmount : ""; var currency = (initPayload.payment && initPayload.payment.currency) ? initPayload.payment.currency : ""; var paymentMethod = (initPayload.payment && initPayload.payment.paymentMethod)? initPayload.payment.paymentMethod : ""; var effectiveDate = (initPayload.payment && initPayload.payment.effectiveDate)? initPayload.payment.effectiveDate : ""; var html = '' + '' + '' + '
' + '
Payment Completed for Claim ' + claimId + '
' + '
' + '

' + dateStr + '

' + '

Dear Policyholder ' + policyHolder + ',

' + '

We are pleased to inform you that the payment associated with your approved insurance claim has been successfully processed.

' + '
Payment Summary
' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '
Claim Number' + claimId + '
Policy Number' + policyId + '
Payment Amount' + claimAmount + ' ' + currency + '
Payment Method' + paymentMethod + '
Payment Date' + effectiveDate + '
' + '

Please allow standard banking timelines for the funds to be credited to your account.

' + '
' + 'View Payment Details' + '
' + '

If you have any questions, please contact our Claims Support team at exavaluinsuranceaccelarator@gmail.com.

' + '

Sincerely,
Exasure Insurance Integration Cloud
Claims & Payments Operations

' + '
' + '
Exasure Insurance Integration Cloud | http://localhost:5173/home
This is an automated message. Please do not reply.
' + '
'; mc.setProperty("emailBody", html, "default"); mc.setProperty("emailSubject", "Payment Completed – Claim " + claimId, "default");
